MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-02-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION & MANUFACTURING INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD FACTS REGARDING DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT THAT INDUCED PLAINTIFF TO FAIL TO FILE WITHIN FOUR YEARS OF COMPLETION OF THE PROJECT. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE OF TODAY'S RULING. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST CHRISTOPHER A. BROSE, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-02-2010 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-18-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-24-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2010 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION & MANUFACTURING INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Christopher Allen Brose, Esq. Attorney at Law, (650) 692-4800 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Mark Daniel Hudak, Esq. of Carr, McClellan, Ingersoll, Thompson & Horn (650) 342-9600 Appearing thru CourtCall for Defendant and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with twenty days leave to amend. Plaintiff to plead facts regarding defendant's conduct that induced plaintiff to fail to file within four years of completion of the project. Parties waive notice of today's ruling. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
